docs:
# Textarea
Multi-line text input with matching Aurora styling and focus states.
## Import
```tsx
import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
```
## Usage
```tsx
<Textarea placeholder="Write something..." rows={4} value={undefined} gradient={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **placeholder** (string) — default: `"Write something..."`: Placeholder
- **rows** (number) — default: `4`: Rows
- **value** (number): Value
- **gradient** (boolean): Gradient
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add textarea
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/textarea
```
